sections.paragraph:
, גְּדוּלָּה (for copies differ, see J. H. Mich. on 2Sa 7:23 1Ch 17:19), and גְּדֻלָּה f. a word especially belonging to the later Hebrew.

(1) prop. magnitude, greatness, concr. great actions, 2Sa 7:23 1Ch 17:19. Pl. גְּדֻלֹּות 1Ch 17:19, 21 1Ch 17:21and Psa 145:6 כתיב.

(2) magnificence, majesty of God, Psa 145:3 of a king, Est 1:4 Psa 71:21.
